## Permanent crop sales

```{r}
#| label: temporary crop sales table

perm_crop_sales_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "perm_crop_sales_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::perm_crop_sales(
  crops_sales_df = perm_crop_sales_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  crop_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(
    params_df$perm_crop_sales_crop_id_var
  ),
  crop_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(
    parms_df$perm_crop_sales_crop_vals[[1]]
  ),
  sold_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(
    params_df$perm_crop_sales_sold_var
  ),
  sold_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(
    params_df$perm_crop_sales_sold_val
  ),
  amt_sold_vars = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(
    params_df$perm_crop_sales_amt_sold_vars[[1]]
  ),
  amt_sold_dk_val = params_df$perm_crop_sales_amt_sold_dk_val,
  group_var = "supervisor"
)
```
